prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: transparent game sprite source for station node
Primary request: Create a detailed Tokyo Station Shinkansen terminal node sprite for an isometric early-2000s Japanese railway management simulator.
Subject: compact but rich station complex: arched platform roofs, parallel Shinkansen platforms, glass concourse, overhead catenary, dense urban terminal detail, small platform lights, no readable signs.
Style/medium: crisp 2D isometric pixel-art, late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese transport sim, dense readable detail, cohesive with A-Train / SimCity-style references, not low-poly, not photorealistic.
Composition/framing: one complete station node only, three-quarter isometric angle, horizontal platform orientation, generous padding, no trains, no city background.
Background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no shadow on background, no gradient, no texture.
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no checkerboard; subject fully separated from magenta and must not contain #ff00ff.
